creator: alc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 149648
New patch

I finally got a chance to work on this problem and develop a patch that I'm not ashamed to commit.  This patch also addresses a related problem on small MIPS systems where we create a set of free lists that will never contain any pages.  Nonetheless, we will search those free lists on every page allocation:

 sysctl vm.phys_free
vm.phys_free:
DOMAIN 0:

FREE LIST 0:

  ORDER (SIZE)  |  NUMBER
                |  POOL 0  |  POOL 1  |  POOL 2
--            -- --      -- --      -- --      --
   8 (  1024K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   7 (   512K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   6 (   256K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   5 (   128K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   4 (    64K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   3 (    32K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   2 (    16K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   1 (     8K)  |       0  |       0  |       0
   0 (     4K)  |       0  |       0  |       0

FREE LIST 1:

  ORDER (SIZE)  |  NUMBER
                |  POOL 0  |  POOL 1  |  POOL 2
--            -- --      -- --      -- --      --
   8 (  1024K)  |      21  |       0  |       0
   7 (   512K)  |       0  |       1  |       0
   6 (   256K)  |       1  |       0  |       0
   5 (   128K)  |       1  |       1  |       0
   4 (    64K)  |       4  |       0  |       0
   3 (    32K)  |       3  |       0  |       0
   2 (    16K)  |       1  |       0  |       0
   1 (     8K)  |       0  |       1  |       0
   0 (     4K)  |       1  |       0  |       0
